Anyways . . i love Ryoma.. and Rocma in general ofc. Also if you want me to make a Regular Rocma version (her original gender) of this bot too then i will ! ! just say so in the reviews and i will .. do it.

Forgot to add,, i hoped yall had a good christmas!! (if u celebrate it)
